message:
feat(runtime): wire new modules into lib and refine scheduler behavior

- src/lib.rs: register cancel, distributed, migration, and web modules
  in the crate root, making them available as public API
- three_lane.rs: adjust scheduler lane priorities and task dispatch
  logic to account for distributed encoding workloads
- worker.rs: refine worker lifecycle to integrate with the new
  cancellation subsystem, ensuring clean shutdown propagation
- tests/scheduler_backoff.rs: extend backoff tests to cover the
  updated scheduling behavior with distributed workloads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
